topics.title: Logging in
topics.answer:
Open the portal link you were given and sign in with your club email and password.

If CS Portal does not recognise you after installing the app, log out and sign in again in Safari or Chrome first, then reopen the home-screen icon.

Forgotten password: use the reset option on the login page or contact the office.

topics.title: Install CS Portal on your phone
topics.answer:
Add the portal to your home screen so it opens full-screen as CS Portal with the club icon.

iPhone (Safari): Share → Add to Home Screen → Add.

Android (Chrome): ⋮ menu → Install app / Add to Home screen.

Sign in once; the app remembers you until you log out.

topics.title: Understanding your dashboard
topics.answer:
Your dashboard is the main screen before, during and after sessions.

Session cards show today’s participants and what still needs doing.

The logo halo shows if feedback, announcements or documents need attention.

Use Next session, Week and Term under the cards for planning.

topics.title: Session card colours
topics.answer:
Blue — scheduled, nothing to do yet.

Orange — feedback still pending; tap the card to submit.

Green — feedback submitted or absence recorded.

Red — incident or urgent item.

Purple — schedule change (cancellation or roster change).

topics.title: Logo halo and notification centre
topics.answer:
Coloured dots around the club logo show what is waiting. Tap the logo to open the notification centre.

Orange — outstanding feedback.
Red — announcement or document to sign.
Green — all up to date.
Multiple dots — more than one type waiting.

topics.title: Session feedback
topics.answer:
Always open feedback from the orange session card when you can — it pre-fills participant, date and time.

Complete engagement, regulation, independence and notes, then submit.

Quick menu → Session feedback is only a backup; you must pick the participant yourself.

topics.title: Marking absent
topics.answer:
If a participant did not attend, mark Absent from their session card or participant card.

The card turns green once absence is recorded — you do not need separate feedback for that session.

topics.title: My participants
topics.answer:
Open My participants from the bottom bar (CLIENTS) or Quick menu.

My participants — your roster.
All participants — search anyone at the club.

Tap a name for quick actions: Feedback, Absence, Incident, Cancellation and General Info.

topics.title: General Info on a participant
topics.answer:
On a participant card, tap General Info for age, medical notes, triggers, support level and communication preferences.

Read this before community or home sessions — especially for new participants.

topics.title: Quick menu
topics.answer:
Open Quick menu from your dashboard (☰) for all forms: feedback, incident, cancellation, timesheet, expenses, venue review, pickup, documents, training and settings.

Tiles you do not need are hidden for your role.

topics.title: Announcements and signing
topics.answer:
When the office posts an announcement, the logo halo may turn red. Tap the logo → read the message → Sign / confirm.

Signed items move to Signed announcements / reminders in the same centre.

topics.title: Reminders
topics.answer:
Under Reminders in the notification centre (tap the logo), tiles such as Outstanding feedbacks (orange) jump straight to sessions still waiting for feedback.

Term view on the dashboard shows days in red when feedback is still outstanding.

topics.title: Messaging
topics.answer: In-portal messaging is not available yet. Use Zoho Cliq or contact the office for urgent messages.

topics.title: Timesheet
topics.answer:
Quick menu → Finance → Timesheet.

Submit by the 24th of the month so hours land in that month’s pay.

Green rows — feedback complete, ready to pay.
Orange rows — feedback still pending; complete it from the dashboard session card.

topics.title: Expenses
topics.answer:
Quick menu → Finance → Expenses.

Add Description, Amount (GBP) and upload a receipt photo for each line. Use + Add row for multiple items.

A PDF is saved to My Documents when you submit.

topics.title: My Documents
topics.answer:
Quick menu → My Documents for payslips, signed contracts, signed announcements and expense PDFs.

Payslips appear here when published — you can delete Zoho People if you wish; keep Zoho Cliq.

topics.title: Venue review
topics.answer:
Quick menu → Venue review (or top bar VENUE on some dashboards).

Record opening or closing checks: confirm venue, date and time, then answer whether there are issues to report.

topics.title: Pickup and handover
topics.answer:
Quick menu → Pickup / handover (or top bar PICKUP).

Search for a participant or tap New to start today’s handover.

Complete Drop Off on arrival and Pick Up when they are collected.

topics.title: Incident report
topics.answer:
Quick menu → Incident report, or use the quick action on a participant card.

Use for anything that needs recording for safeguarding or safety. Submit as soon as you can.

topics.title: Cancellation
topics.answer:
Quick menu → Cancellation when a session cannot go ahead.

You can also start from a participant card if you already know which child it affects.

topics.title: Alerts, notifications and permissions
topics.answer:
Quick menu → Settings → Alerts & notifications.

Turn on notifications once per device (use Send test to check).

Location is only for Bespoke Programme / Day Centre staff during their rota shift.

Microphone is optional — for voice feedback or voice typing in forms.

topics.title: Portal guide
topics.answer:
Ask here in Portal help — type a question about feedback, participants, venue checks, or any Portal task.

You can also open the full walkthrough from the link at the bottom of this panel when you need the published Portal guide page.

topics.title: Top bar buttons (PHOTO, CLIENTS, VENUE…)
topics.answer:
Top bar shortcuts (if shown for your role):

PHOTO — session photos.
CLIENTS — My participants.
VENUE — venue review.
PICKUP — drop off / pick up.
REVIEW — swimming term review (swimming staff).
PLAN — session planner (when active).
LEAD / STATS — programme lead tools only.

topics.title: Logout
topics.answer:
Quick menu → scroll to Settings → Logout.

Use this on shared devices. You will need to sign in again next time.

topics.title: Lead-only tools
topics.answer:
Programme leads see extra top-bar and Quick menu items: LEAD feedback report, STATS (sessions overview), performance / term review tools and Lead session report.

If you think you should have lead access but do not see these, contact the office.

topics.title: Update my profile
topics.answer:
Quick menu → Update my profile (annual profile check-in) to confirm personal and emergency details.

Complete once a year when prompted, or open from the Quick menu any time.

topics.title: Week and Term views
topics.answer:
Under your dashboard overview cards:

Next session — upcoming slot list.
Week — sessions grouped by day this week.
Term — working days in the term; red days still have outstanding feedback.

topics.title: Pool and room icons on session cards
topics.answer:
On TODAY session cards, the right column shows a pool or room icon for where the session runs (Big Pool, Small Pool, Hub Room, lanes, Gym, etc.).

The venue name also appears under the time on the left.

In Next session, the icon appears beside the area name as a small label.

topics.title: Override labels (ABSENT, MAKE UP…)
topics.answer:
When the office changes a session (ABSENT, MAKE UP, moved time, etc.), a coloured chip appears on the right of the card.

You still see the participant name in the centre and the venue under the time — the pool/room icon is hidden on those rows so the override is easy to read.

If it says Changed by Admin, the office updated the roster or schedule.

topics.title: Session photos (PHOTO)
topics.answer:
Tap PHOTO in the top bar (when shown for your role) to upload session photos.

Pick the participant and session, attach the image, then submit.

Photos help the office and families see progress — use during or after the session.

topics.title: Swimming term review (REVIEW)
topics.answer:
Swimming instructors may see REVIEW in the top bar.

Use it for term swimming reviews — progress notes for participants in your swimming roster.

If you teach swimming but do not see REVIEW, contact the office.

topics.title: Next session on a day off
topics.answer:
When you have no sessions today, the dashboard shows Next session with upcoming slots.

On a full day off you may also see participant circles for who is on your roster that day — tap a name for quick actions.

Use Week or Term for the full picture.

topics.title: Purple session cards
topics.answer:
A purple (lilac) session card means the schedule changed — time, venue, instructor or roster was updated.

Open the card to see details and complete any feedback or absence steps still required.

Override chips on the right explain what changed (e.g. MAKE UP).

topics.title: Using Portal help
topics.answer:
Portal help on your dashboard answers from the staff help guide — login, feedback, timesheets, announcements and more.

Type a short question or tap a suggested topic. When AI is enabled, answers can include screenshots.

Open Staff help guide (portal_help_guide.html) for the full illustrated list, or ask Portal help if you are stuck.
